name: MoneyGram
description_short: Cincinnati's MoneyGram at 4777 Kenard Ave offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services with extended hours 7AM-10PM daily.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 4777 Kenard Ave in Cincinnati, OH operates as a standalone check-cashing and money services location. This Cincinnati branch maintains extended hours Monday through Sunday from 7AM to 10PM, making it accessible for both early morning and evening transactions. The location serves Cincinnati residents and visitors needing quick financial services without being located inside another retail store.

At this Kenard Ave location in Cincinnati, MoneyGram provides check cashing, money transfers, bill payment services, and prepaid card options. Customers can reach the branch directly at +1 513-681-7650 to confirm services, rates, or ask questions before visiting. Staff can assist with international and domestic money transfers to help connect Cincinnati residents with family and friends.

For Cincinnati residents, this MoneyGram location is ideal for after-hours check cashing since it stays open until 10PM every night. Bring a valid government-issued ID for all transactions. The standalone location means dedicated service from staff trained specifically in money services rather than general retail.
pros: 14+ locations across Cincinnati neighborhoods for geographic convenience
Extended operating hours at many locations, including CVS until 10-11 PM and Walmart until 8-9 PM
Partner locations at major retailers (Walmart, CVS) accessible during regular shopping trips
Online and offline transfer management options available
Locations at independent retailers serving specific communities (Tienda San Luis, convenience stores)
Real-time location search and hours information provided online
Multiple contact phone numbers available for different locations
cons: Website provides no information on transfer fees, exchange rates, or pricing structure
No details on transfer speed (same-day, 1-3 business days, etc.)
Limited transparency on transfer limits or restrictions
Dependent on partner retailer hours and policies rather than dedicated service control
No information on customer service response times or dispute resolution processes
best_for: Consumers needing convenient domestic or international money transfers near their home or workplace
Customers who prefer in-person transactions at familiar retail locations like Walmart or CVS
People in Cincinnati neighborhoods with agent locations but without traditional banking access
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for Cincinnati residents and visitors who need to send or receive money transfers and value access through familiar retail locations during extended hours. The main caveat is that the website lacks critical consumer information about fees, exchange rates, transfer speeds, and service terms—essential details needed to evaluate whether MoneyGram offers competitive value compared to alternatives.
services: Location search by address, city, state, or ZIP
Extended hours availability at partner retail locations
Multiple Cincinnati area locations for customer access
Partner agent network at Walmart stores
Partner agent network at CVS pharmacies
Partner agent network at independent convenience stores
Partner agent network at specialty retailers
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4777 Kenard Ave, Cincinnati, OH. Check cashing and bill payment services, open daily 7AM-10PM.
